string.text: Safari. The hunt for mutants has begun.
A contract for a new life. The end of history.
A contract for a new life. The C-11 complex is destroyed.
Metro complex-15. The entrance to the collector is open.

There were many questions on the Great Earth. But, thanks to Athena - I came out dry out of the water. Now I work for the SBU, next to her. But ... something tells me that soon, I will return again ... to the zone ... home ...
A contract for a new life is the beginning of the game.
A good life contract 2. There is a way out
A good life contract 2. New faces
A contract for a good life 2. Illusions of the past
Good life 2. Start of the game
A good life contract, addition: Pressent
Modification: "A contract for a good life: addition." \n %C [Gray] Do you want to start a new game?
Hunter gave me an empty canister and asked to look for fuel - which should be drained in this canister.
Using this key, you can get into the warehouse.

PDA of one of the stalkers who died at the post. 
 there is one new entry: 
 %C [gray] *** 
 Dile, who is this? Ours were shot ... I was left alone! Blah ... I am the end ... they are already going ... ***
The key to one of the stalkers who died at the post. To find out what he is from ...

4ECTOR - leading developer; Plot, implementation, voice acting, SDK. 
 Maylayshez - graphics department; Picture, sound, locations, sdk, code. 
 FL1VESS1331 - refinement; Text, balance, content, test. 
 gghostt - department C ++, lua; engine, scripts, textures of the sky, ambient. 
 azetrix - 3D department; NPS models. 
 voice acting modifications: 
 Vladislav Khalimov AKA Night Guard 
 Oleg Kuzma AKA Slesar6razriada 
 Ivan Yaskevich AKA North.

Thanks for the locations: Audron, rebel. \n thanks for other developments: den_stash, sin!, Lafugix, XahTep, GAZ1K, TRIS, MAKDM, Fantomicw, Spin_Tires, Stalk15, Gefos, Cromm Cruac, Misery, Ekagors, Strelokqvt command Jurok, Moskir, 3vtiger, Naxac, Stalker36VRN, Rilack, Singapur22, Greshnik13rs.
